mapper.select: SELECT * FROM edu_questionnaire WHERE questionnaire_type = #{questionnaireType} AND status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_questionnaire (title, questionnaire_type, semester, start_time, end_time, status) VALUES (#{title}, #{questionnaireType}, #{semester}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM edu_evaluation WHERE questionnaire_id = #{questionnaireId}
